intro: Podonephelium homei, commonly known as the "Malabar madder," is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
